project_name: OutPace Intelligence - Multi-Tenant B2B Intelligence Platform

design_philosophy.primary_approach: Big 4 Consulting Aesthetic - Professional, data-dense, trustworthy
key_principles: Decision-focused: Every screen answers a specific business question
Data density over whitespace: Maximize information per screen without clutter
Professional polish: Consulting-grade exports and presentation quality
Strict hierarchy: Clear visual structure for scanning and comprehension
Trustworthy: High contrast, accessible, no playful elements
anti_patterns_to_avoid: NO bright neon colors or gradients
NO rounded pill buttons (use sharp, professional edges)
NO center-aligned text blocks (left-align for readability)
NO generic SaaS blue (#3B82F6) or teal (#1B93A4)

typography.philosophy: Swiss Brutalist with Corporate Authority - High contrast weights, professional hierarchy

headings.usage: Main headings, page titles, dashboard titles
headings.rationale: Professional, technical authority without being sterile. Used by enterprise platforms.

subheadings.usage: Section headers, card titles, metric labels
subheadings.rationale: Clean, modern, excellent readability for data-heavy interfaces

body.usage: Body text, descriptions, table content, form inputs
body.rationale: Industry standard for dashboards, optimized for screen readability

data_mono.usage: Numbers, metrics, data values, code snippets, API keys
data_mono.rationale: Monospace for precise data alignment and technical credibility

typesetting_rules.headlines: tracking-tight leading-tight font-light or font-bold (high contrast)

color_system.description: Deep, professional dark mode with jewel-tone accents for authority and premium feel. High contrast for data clarity.

background.description: Deep slate backgrounds with subtle blue tint for premium feel

brand_primary.description: Professional blue - trustworthy, corporate, not generic SaaS blue. Use ONLY for CTAs and primary actions.

brand_secondary.description: Deep purple accent - premium, intelligence, sophistication. Use sparingly for highlights.

accent_success.description: Success states, positive metrics, upward trends

accent_danger.description: Error states, negative metrics, downward trends

border.description: Borders with subtle blue tint for cohesion

chart_colors.description: Color-blind friendly palette for data visualization

contrast_rules.minimum_contrast: WCAG AA - 4.5:1 for normal text, 3:1 for large text

interactive_states.hover: MUST explicitly set both bg and text color. Hover state should be lighter than default.
interactive_states.focus: MUST have HIGHER contrast than default with visible ring
interactive_states.active: MUST be darker/more saturated than hover
interactive_states.disabled: Reduce opacity to 40-50%, maintain contrast where possible

text_on_backgrounds.dark_bg: Use foreground-primary (98% white) for high contrast
text_on_backgrounds.colored_bg: Always test contrast, add text-shadow if needed
text_on_backgrounds.images: MUST use gradient overlay or text-shadow for readability

usage_guidelines.primary_color_usage: LIMIT to CTAs, primary buttons, active states, key metrics. Do NOT overuse.
usage_guidelines.secondary_color_usage: Highlights, badges, premium features, intelligence indicators
usage_guidelines.semantic_colors: Use success/warning/danger ONLY for their semantic meaning, not decoration
usage_guidelines.neutral_dominance: 95% of UI should be neutral grays. Color is functional, not decorative.
usage_guidelines.gradient_policy: AVOID gradients. Use solid colors with subtle borders and shadows for depth.

spacing_system.philosophy: Dense but breathable - maximize data per screen while maintaining clear hierarchy

component_spacing.card_padding: p-6 (24px) - CRITICAL: All cards with borders MUST have internal padding
component_spacing.grid_gaps: gap-4 md:gap-6 for dense layouts, gap-6 md:gap-8 for breathing room
component_spacing.stack_spacing: space-y-4 for related items, space-y-6 for sections
component_spacing.inline_spacing: space-x-2 for tight groups, space-x-4 for separated items

layout_rules.mobile_first: Always start with grid-cols-1, expand to md:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-3
layout_rules.optical_alignment: Adjust padding for visual balance, not geometric perfection
layout_rules.container_constraints: Use max-w-* to prevent ultra-wide layouts on large screens
layout_rules.vertical_rhythm: Consistent spacing between sections using py-* utilities

dashboard_grid.description: Dense, data-driven grid for maximum information density

implementation.base: grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 lg:grid-cols-4 gap-4 md:gap-6
rules: Every pixel utilized - no empty grid cells
Use h-full on children to ensure equal heights
Grid items MUST be direct children (no wrapper divs)
Override default stretch with align-items: start, add align-self: stretch to individual items

super_admin_layout.description: Fixed sidebar navigation with scrollable content area

tenant_dashboard_layout.description: Sticky header with filters, scrollable grid of opportunities

implementation.header: sticky top-0 z-10 bg-background-primary/95 backdrop-blur-xl border-b border-border
implementation.grid: grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-3 gap-4 md:gap-6 p-4 md:p-6

surface_strategies.description: Minimal shadows, sharp edges, 1px borders for definition. Professional, not decorative.

flat_no_border.description: For dense dashboards, use flat rectangles with no borders

implementation.description: Sticky header with glassmorphism for premium feel

modal_overlay.description: Dark overlay for modals and dialogs

implementation.description: Expose the grid structure with visible borders

component_library.philosophy: Use Shadcn/UI for all interactive components. Customize heavily for brand.

forms.customization: Override default styles to match dark theme and professional aesthetic

data_display.customization: Remove rounded corners, use flat borders

feedback.usage: Use Sonner for all toast notifications

charts.customization: Use chart_colors palette, dark backgrounds, high contrast

OpportunityCard.description: Card displaying opportunity with score, title, description, tags
OpportunityCard.structure: Flat card with border, score badge, title, metadata row, description preview
OpportunityCard.interactions: Hover lift, click to detail view

IntelligenceFeedItem.description: News/intelligence item with source, timestamp, summary
IntelligenceFeedItem.structure: Compact row with icon, title, source, timestamp

MetricCard.description: KPI display with value, label, trend indicator
MetricCard.structure: Large number (mono font), label, trend arrow/percentage

TenantBrandingPreview.description: Live preview of tenant branding (logo, colors)

ExportModal.structure: Checkbox list of opportunities, format selector, export button

ChatAssistant.description: Fixed bottom-right chat bubble with expandable interface
ChatAssistant.structure: Floating button, expandable panel with messages and input
ChatAssistant.interactions: Toggle open/close, send messages, typing indicators

motion_and_interactions.philosophy: Subtle, professional animations. No playful bounces or excessive motion.

entrance_animations.cards: Stagger fade-in with slight upward motion
entrance_animations.modals: Fade in overlay, scale up content from 95% to 100%

loading_states.skeleton: Use Skeleton component with pulse animation
loading_states.spinners: Simple circular spinner, no elaborate animations
loading_states.progress: Smooth progress bar with indeterminate state

transition_properties.rule: NEVER use transition: all. Always specify properties.
transition_properties.common: transition-colors duration-150, transition-transform duration-200, transition-opacity duration-200
transition_properties.exclude_transforms: Do not include transform in transition property (breaks animations)

accessibility.decorative_elements: Add aria-hidden='true' to purely decorative animations

icon_library.usage: Use for all UI icons (navigation, actions, status indicators)

phosphor_icons.usage: If duotone weight needed for visual hierarchy
phosphor_icons.rationale: Excellent for dense dashboards with duotone variants

logo_usage.tenant_logos: Dynamic per tenant, displayed in header and exports
logo_usage.platform_logo: OutPace Intelligence logo in super admin and footer
logo_usage.powered_by: Small 'Powered by OutPace Intelligence' tagline in tenant footer

image_requirements.none_needed: This is a data-heavy dashboard. No hero images or marketing photos required.
image_requirements.avatars: Use initials in colored circles for user avatars

chart_styling.tooltips: bg-background-elevated border border-border shadow-lg rounded-md p-3

data_density.principle: Show as much data as possible without overwhelming
techniques: Inline trend indicators (↑↓ arrows with percentages)
Compact metric cards with large numbers

branding_system.multi_tenant_approach: Dynamic CSS variables injected per tenant

implementation.tenant_logo: URL stored in tenant config, displayed in header
implementation.css_injection: Use style tag in document head with tenant-specific variables

branding_constraints.logo_size: max-h-10 (40px) in header, max-h-16 (64px) in exports
branding_constraints.color_usage: Tenant primary used for CTAs, secondary for accents
branding_constraints.fallback: If no tenant branding, use platform default (blue/purple)

export_branding.pdf_header: Tenant logo + name, report title, date
export_branding.excel_header: Tenant branding in first row, frozen header row

requirements.color_contrast: 4.5:1 for normal text, 3:1 for large text and UI components
requirements.keyboard_navigation: All interactive elements must be keyboard accessible
requirements.focus_indicators: Visible focus rings on all focusable elements
requirements.screen_readers: Proper ARIA labels, roles, and live regions

testing_attributes.data_testid: MUST be added to all interactive and key informational elements

semantic_html.landmarks: Use header, nav, main, aside, footer
semantic_html.lists: Use ul/ol for lists, not divs
semantic_html.buttons_vs_links: Buttons for actions, links for navigation

mobile_strategy.philosophy: Mobile-first, but optimized for desktop (primary use case)
mobile_strategy.navigation: Hamburger menu on mobile, full sidebar on desktop
mobile_strategy.grids: Single column on mobile, 2-3 columns on tablet, 3-4 on desktop
mobile_strategy.tables: Horizontal scroll on mobile, full width on desktop
mobile_strategy.modals: Full screen on mobile, centered on desktop

image_constraints.mobile_height: max-h-[80vh] md:max-h-none (prevent images from dominating small screens)
image_constraints.aspect_ratios: Use aspect-* utilities for consistent ratios

optimization_strategies.lazy_loading: Lazy load charts and heavy components
optimization_strategies.virtualization: Use virtual scrolling for long lists (react-window)
optimization_strategies.image_optimization: Use WebP format, lazy load images

bundle_size.chart_library: Recharts is already included, no additional weight
bundle_size.icon_library: Lucide-react is tree-shakeable, only import used icons
bundle_size.avoid: Do NOT add heavy 3D libraries (Three.js, R3F) - not needed for this project

pdf_exports.style: Professional consulting report - clean, branded, data-focused

layout.body: Opportunity cards with all details, charts as images

pdf_exports.colors: Use tenant branding colors, high contrast for print
pdf_exports.spacing: Generous margins (1 inch), clear section breaks

excel_exports.style: Clean data table with branded header

formatting.headers: Bold, tenant primary color background, white text

security_and_privacy.data_isolation: Strict tenant data separation - no cross-tenant queries

ui_considerations.no_tenant_switching: Users cannot see or switch to other tenants
ui_considerations.no_methodology_exposure: Hide all AI prompts, scoring algorithms, internal logic
ui_considerations.audit_trails: Log all exports and data access for compliance

authentication.login_branding: Branded login page per tenant (subdomain or context)
authentication.session_management: Secure session handling, auto-logout on inactivity
authentication.role_based_access: Super Admin, Tenant Admin, Tenant User roles

pages: Super Admin Dashboard (tenant list, system health)
Tenant Branding Configuration (logo upload, color pickers)

critical_rules: DO NOT use complete transparent backgrounds in headers, overlays, or any surface with content underneath
DO NOT center-align text blocks - use left-align for readability
DO NOT use generic SaaS blue (#3B82F6) or teal (#1B93A4) - use the defined brand colors
DO NOT use Space Grotesk font - use IBM Plex Sans, Manrope, Inter, IBM Plex Mono
DO NOT add playful elements, emojis, or consumer-grade aesthetics
DO NOT use rounded pill buttons - use sharp, professional edges (rounded-lg max)
DO NOT use gradients - use solid colors with borders and shadows
DO NOT use transition: all - always specify transition properties
MUST add data-testid to all interactive and key informational elements
MUST use Shadcn components for all forms, modals, dropdowns, etc.
MUST use Recharts (via Shadcn Chart) for all data visualizations
MUST use Sonner for toast notifications
MUST use named exports for components, default exports for pages
MUST ensure high contrast (4.5:1 minimum) for all text
MUST add internal padding (p-6) to all cards with borders
design_priorities: Data density over whitespace - maximize information per screen
High contrast - dark mode with clear hierarchy
Trustworthy - no playful or experimental elements
Accessible - WCAG AA minimum, keyboard navigable
Performant - lazy load, code split, optimize bundles

use_shadcn_for: All forms (Input, Select, Checkbox, Radio, Switch, Textarea, Form, Label)
All overlays (Dialog, Sheet, Popover, Dropdown Menu, Tooltip, Alert Dialog)
All data display (Table, Badge, Card, Separator, Skeleton)
customize_shadcn: Override default styles to match dark theme
Use flat borders instead of shadows
Apply brand colors to interactive states

layout_implementation.super_admin: Fixed sidebar (w-64) with scrollable content area
layout_implementation.tenant_dashboard: Sticky header with filters, scrollable grid of opportunities
layout_implementation.opportunity_detail: Full-screen modal or side panel with all details

branding_implementation.tenant_colors: Inject CSS variables (--tenant-primary, --tenant-secondary) in document head
branding_implementation.tenant_logo: Display from tenant config URL in header and exports
branding_implementation.fallback: Use platform default colors if tenant branding not configured
branding_implementation.preview: Live preview in super admin branding configuration

export_implementation.pdf: Use library like jsPDF or react-pdf to generate branded PDFs
export_implementation.excel: Use library like xlsx or exceljs to generate branded Excel files
export_implementation.selection: Modal with checkboxes to select opportunities for export
export_implementation.branding: Include tenant logo, colors, and 'Powered by OutPace Intelligence' tagline

testing_strategy.integration_tests: Test user flows (login, view opportunities, export)
testing_strategy.accessibility_tests: Test keyboard navigation, screen readers, contrast
testing_strategy.visual_regression: Test UI consistency across browsers and screen sizes
testing_strategy.data_testid: Use data-testid attributes for stable test selectors

general_principles: Avoid generic centered layouts - use asymmetry and clear hierarchy
Create depth through layered design with z-index hierarchy
Use subtle textures (grain, noise) to add richness without clutter
Every interaction needs micro-animations - hover, focus, active states
Use 2-3x more spacing than feels comfortable for premium feel
Static = dead - add subtle motion to bring interfaces to life
Prioritize reusing existing components from src/components/ui
Create new components that match existing style and conventions
Components MUST use named exports, pages MUST use default exports
Use Sonner for all toast notifications
Customize scrollbars - NO default browser scrollbar gutter
interaction_design: All interactive elements MUST have hover states
All interactive elements MUST have focus states (for keyboard navigation)
All interactive elements MUST have active/pressed states
Disabled states should reduce opacity to 40-50%
Loading states should use skeleton screens or spinners
Error states should be clearly visible with semantic colors
Success states should provide clear feedback (toast, checkmark, etc.)
content_hierarchy: Use size, weight, and color to establish clear hierarchy
Most important content should be largest and highest contrast
Secondary content should be smaller and lower contrast
Tertiary content should be smallest and lowest contrast
Use whitespace to separate sections and create breathing room
Group related content together with consistent spacing
form_design: Always use Shadcn form components (Input, Select, Checkbox, etc.)
Labels should be clear and positioned above inputs
Required fields should be marked with asterisk or '(required)'
Error messages should appear below inputs in danger color
Success states should show checkmark or success message
Disabled inputs should be visually distinct (reduced opacity)
Form buttons should be full-width on mobile, auto-width on desktop
table_design: Use Shadcn Table component for all data tables
Headers should be bold with bottom border
Rows should have hover state (background change)
Alternate row colors for better readability (optional)
Use horizontal scroll on mobile for wide tables
Sortable columns should have sort indicator (arrow icon)
Pagination should be clear and accessible
modal_design: Use Shadcn Dialog or Sheet for modals
Overlay should be dark (bg-black/60) with backdrop blur
Modal content should be centered on desktop, full-screen on mobile
Close button should be clearly visible (top-right)
Modal should trap focus (keyboard navigation stays within modal)
Clicking overlay should close modal (unless critical action)
navigation_design: Primary navigation should be persistent (sidebar or header)
Active page should be clearly indicated (color, underline, background)
Mobile navigation should use hamburger menu or bottom tabs
Breadcrumbs should be used for deep hierarchies
Back button should be provided when navigating into detail views
feedback_design: Use Sonner for toast notifications (success, error, info, warning)
Toasts should auto-dismiss after 3-5 seconds (unless error)
Loading states should be immediate (no delay before showing spinner)
Progress bars should be used for long operations
Confirmation dialogs should be used for destructive actions
Success feedback should be clear and celebratory (but professional)
empty_states: Empty states should explain why content is missing
Empty states should provide clear next action (CTA button)
Use illustration or icon to make empty state friendly
Avoid generic 'No data' messages - be specific and helpful
error_handling: Error messages should be clear and actionable
Avoid technical jargon in user-facing errors
Provide suggestions for how to fix the error
Use danger color for error states
Log detailed errors to console for debugging

next_steps: Update index.css with new color system and typography
Update tailwind.config.js with extended color palette and fonts
Build Super Admin pages (Dashboard, Tenant Management, User Management)
Build Tenant Auth pages (Login, Password Reset)
Build Tenant Dashboard pages (Main Dashboard, Opportunity Detail)
Add branding injection system (CSS variables per tenant)
Test accessibility (keyboard navigation, screen readers, contrast)
